title: Automated Wheat Farm
description: A fully automated wheat farm using pistons to harvest mature wheat and a water stream to collect drops into a hopper. Farmland rows are irrigated by a central water channel. An observer above each row or a clock triggers pistons when wheat reaches full growth (age=7). Collected wheat drops flow into hoppers leading to a chest. Bone meal dispensers optionally speed up growth. Typical size: 9x9 farmland patches with 1 water source per 4-block row.
